modules.name: tchivs/mb-core
modules.description: Portable checked arithmetic, bounded storage, resource budgets, backend-neutral I/O, and explicit host capability contracts for MoonBit Native Foundation.

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-core/error
semantic_interface: pub fn CoreError::new(ErrorCategory, ErrorCode, operation? : String, requested? : UInt64, completed? : UInt64, range_start? : UInt64, range_end? : UInt64, source_offset? : UInt64, limit? : UInt64, context? : String) -> Self

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-core/checked
semantic_interface: pub fn CheckedRange::subrange(Self, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-core/budget
semantic_interface: pub fn ResourceCharge::new(bytes~ : UInt64, allocations~ : UInt64, allocation_size~ : UInt64, width~ : UInt64, height~ : UInt64, pixels~ : UInt64, work~ : UInt64) -> Self
pub fn ResourceLimits::new(bytes~ : UInt64, allocations~ : UInt64, allocation_size~ : UInt64, width~ : UInt64, height~ : UInt64, pixels~ : UInt64, depth~ : UInt64, work~ : UInt64) -> Self

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-core/bytes
semantic_interface: pub fn ByteView::subview(Self, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]
pub fn MutByteLease::set(Self, UInt64, Byte) -> Result[Unit, @error.CoreError]
pub fn MutByteLease::split_mut(Self, UInt64) -> Result[(Self, Self), @error.CoreError]
pub fn OwnedBytes::new_with_allocator_and_charge(UInt64, @budget.Budget, &Allocator, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]
pub fn[T] OwnedBytes::with_mut(Self, UInt64, UInt64, (MutByteLease) -> Result[T, @error.CoreError]) -> Result[T, @error.CoreError]

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-core/io
semantic_interface: pub fn checked_seek_position(SeekOrigin, Int64, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[UInt64, @error.CoreError]
pub fn ReadWindow::set(Self, UInt64, Byte) -> Result[Unit, @error.CoreError]

modules.name: tchivs/mb-color
modules.description: Portable explicit color identities, reference sRGB transfer, deterministic quantization, alpha semantics, and bounded profile metadata for MoonBit Native Foundation.

modules.name: tchivs/mb-image
modules.description: Portable explicit image descriptions, safe owned storage and views, deterministic operations, codec contracts, and a strict bounded PPM P6 reference subset for MoonBit Native Foundation.

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-image/metadata
semantic_interface: pub fn MetadataDisposition::new(Array[DispositionField], Array[DispositionField], Array[DispositionField], Bool, MetadataLimits) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]
pub fn MetadataLimits::new(max_entries~ : UInt64, max_token_bytes~ : UInt64, max_value_bytes~ : UInt64, max_total_bytes~ : UInt64, max_disposition_fields~ : UInt64) -> Self
pub fn OpaqueMetadata::from_entries(Array[(String, String, String, Bytes)], MetadataLimits, @budget.Budget) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-image/model
semantic_interface: pub fn ImageDescriptor::new(UInt64, UInt64, ImageFormat, Array[PlaneDescriptor], UInt64, ImageMetadata) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]
pub fn ImageFormat::new(ComponentType, ChannelOrder, PlaneLayout, Endianness) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]
pub fn Orientation::display_height(Self, UInt64, UInt64) -> UInt64
pub fn Orientation::display_width(Self, UInt64, UInt64) -> UInt64
pub fn PlaneDescriptor::new(UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]
pub fn Rect::new(UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-image/storage
semantic_interface: pub fn ImageView::get_byte(Self, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[Byte, @error.CoreError]
pub fn MutImageView::get_byte(Self, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64) -> Result[Byte, @error.CoreError]
pub fn MutImageView::set_byte(Self, UInt64, UInt64, UInt64, Byte) -> Result[Unit, @error.CoreError]

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-image/ops
semantic_interface: pub fn resize_nearest(@storage.ImageView, UInt64, UInt64, @budget.Budget) -> Result[ImageOperationResult, @error.CoreError]

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-image/codec
semantic_interface: pub fn CodecLimits::new(max_probe_bytes~ : UInt64, max_input_bytes~ : UInt64, max_output_bytes~ : UInt64, max_width~ : UInt64, max_height~ : UInt64, max_pixels~ : UInt64, max_work~ : UInt64) -> Self
pub fn DecodeOptions::new(require_complete_input~ : Bool, preserve_opaque_metadata~ : Bool) -> Self
pub fn EncodeOptions::new(lossless_required~ : Bool, preserve_opaque_metadata~ : Bool) -> Self

public_packages.name: tchivs/mb-image/ppm
semantic_interface: pub fn PpmParserLimits::new(max_header_bytes~ : UInt64, max_token_bytes~ : UInt64, max_comment_bytes~ : UInt64, max_comments~ : UInt64) -> Result[Self, @error.CoreError]

promises.stable: Semantic Versioning governs the public contract.
